title: This Indicator Tells You EXACTLY When a New Trend Starts!
author: SoheilPKO
summary_bullets: Desk Indicator is the best trend indicator ever created on TradingView.
Alright, here we click on indicators and we search TASC Directional Movement.
This one, which is an editor specs indicator and written by point coders TASC.
Alright, this is the indicator and as you can see it's added here below the chart in the form of an oscillator.
You can see that we have a line here that is moving above and below the center line which is zero.
This indicator was originally developed by John Ehlers many years ago and now we have it here on TradingView platform.
This indicator is built based on hand function.
Hand function is used for signal processing and because of this, it is very suitable for financial markets to identify signals of momentum changes or trend changes in the market.
By the help of this function, we have more accurate and realistic result based on the changes that are really happening in the market.
The applied function on the price data is transformed and represented here in the form of this oscillator that you can see here.

extracted_rules: When the price is below the center line, the color is blue and this shows that we have greater downside momentum so the price is probably declining in a downtrend and when the line is above the center line, the color is yellow and this shows that we have greater upside momentum so the price is probably advancing in an uptrend.
Alright, by default the length of the oscillator is set at 10 and if we decrease the length, for example, if we set it at 5, the indicator becomes more responsive to the price action.

Here in this indicator, when this line goes above the center line, it shows a probable pollback and when it is closed back below the center line, it shows end of the pollback and an excellent opportunity to enter a short position.

Here in this situation, when the oscillator line goes below the center line, it shows a probable pollback and when it is closed back above the center line, it shows end of the pollback and a great opportunity to enter a long position.

When the line is below the center line, we say the market is trending down and when the line is above the center line, we say that the market is trending up and then by the help of another indicator and price action concepts, we're going to find a low risk trading opportunity inside the identified trends.
If you know this indicator, I mean the parabolic SAR, it is very helpful for identifying pullbacks and end of the pullbacks.

When the dots are above the price, it shows that we have greater downside momentum, so the price is declining and when the dots go below the price, it shows we have greater upside momentum, so the price is advancing.

This shows that probably a downtrend is started, but we don't trade only based on this because we can encounter many false signals, so we need more confirmation to decrease our risk and be more confident that a downtrend is really happening.
So here we are now and in the next step, we want to find a low-risk trading opportunity to enter a trade.
When we get a dot above the price, it shows that now we have greater downside momentum and this shows that probably the pullback ended.
So this was a pullback and here when we got the first dot above the price, we can say that the pullback ended.
During a downtrend, when the price goes for a pullback, before that a swing low is created and this can act as a potential support level.
When we got the first dot above the price, after that we want closing of the price below this level.
In this case, you can see that when we get the first dot above the price, at the same time, the candle is also closed below this low.
So here the cell signal is confirmed and in practice we could enter a short position at this point.
In this case, setting a stop loss above the previous swing high is very far from our trade entry.
So we can set it here above the breaking candle and profit target at 1.5 risk to reward ratio.
To decrease our risk, we only take the first pullback with the conditions that I explained.
When this indicator is showing uptrend, but the parabolic star goes above the price and shows the decline of the price, it shows that probably a pullback is forming.
In an uptrend, when the price goes for a pullback before the pullback, a swing high is created and this can act as a potential resistance level.
